creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
@wawadining’s well-loved dishes are now available at @yasik_dxb @volcan.ae @jakoramen in @social.distrikt at The Pointe. 

We attended the soft opening event last Sunday and the place is a vibe! 🤩 Here are the highlights of our night:
• Contemporary Japanese dishes like Salmon Tacos and Tuna Pizza
• Flavorful Korean comfort food like Gamjang Chicken and Ggochi
• Korean cocktails like Somaek 
• Fun and casual atmosphere 

Tag your foodie besties!
